# createConfiguration

**Type Method**

This function creates an instance of `Configuration` with suitable values for use in Node.js.

## Declaration

```swift
static Configuration createConfiguration();
```

## Discussion

```javascript
import { createConfiguration } from "@apple/cktool.target.nodejs";
```
